technicalSEO.title: Custom Shaped Yard Signs | Banners.com
technicalSEO.metaDescription: Order custom shaped yard signs from Banners.com. From fun shapes to practical ones, we've got you covered. Promote a Birthday party, baby shower or construction business.

Custom Shaped Yard Signs for Outdoor Advertising & Business Promotion

Durable Corrugated Plastic Yard Signs - Order Custom Shapes Today

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Create and Order Almost any Shaped Lawn Sign You'd Like PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Shaped Yard Signs for Maximum Visibility & Impact

** All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.**

** If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300. **

** Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design. **

Shaped yard signs serve as a flexible marketing solution often placed in residential yards for business promotions, political campaigns, property showings, and garage sales. These signs are ideal for various occasions due to their lightweight design, simple setup, and cost-effectiveness compared to other types of signage. Additionally, they are highly efficient at conveying brief messages to drivers and pedestrians nearby.

We offer free online templates, an intuitive online designer and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to your order to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign. Begin your order for professionally designed and manufactured yard signs today.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Material Options for Custom Shaped Yard Sign Durability

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet (the 96 in direction.) The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

*Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.*

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Shaped Yard Sign Installation

The following finishing options are available:

  • 1/2" in white margin or a full bleed (the ink goes all the way to the edge of the sign)
  • Single or double sided signs
  • Yard sign accessories: H Stake 10x15, 10x24 or 10x30. Beefy Stakes. Zip Ties 12 inches - Black and Zip Ties 36 inches - White.

Scoring

All signs over 32" x 48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Shaped Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

  • Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time. Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

  • Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time. Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

  • This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time. Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Shaped Yard Sign Orders

We accept all major credit cards and provide secure online payment processing for your shaped yard sign orders. Payment is processed when your order is approved and sent into production.

For large volume orders or corporate accounts, alternative payment arrangements may be available. Please contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 to discuss payment options for bulk shaped yard sign orders.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Shaped Yard Sign Delivery

All shaped yard signs are carefully packaged to ensure safe delivery to your location. Standard shipping options include ground delivery with tracking information provided once your order ships.

For expedited delivery needs, express shipping options are available during checkout. Large or oversized shaped yard signs may require special handling and additional shipping time.

Please note that production time and shipping time are calculated separately. Your total delivery time includes both the selected production timeframe plus shipping transit time to your location.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business & Marketing Uses for Custom Shaped Yard Signs

Custom shaped yard signs are versatile marketing tools perfect for:

  • Business Promotions: Eye-catching shapes that draw attention to sales, grand openings, and special events
  • Political Campaigns: Distinctive shapes that help candidates stand out from traditional rectangular signs
  • Real Estate: Custom house or arrow shapes for property listings and open house announcements
  • Construction Sites: Warning shapes and directional signs for safety and navigation
  • Special Events: Birthday parties, graduations, and celebrations with fun, themed shapes
  • Garage Sales: Arrow shapes and attention-grabbing designs to direct traffic
  • Non-Profit Organizations: Custom shapes that reflect your cause or mission

The lightweight corrugated plastic material makes these signs easy to install with ground stakes while remaining durable enough for extended outdoor use in various weather conditions.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shaped Yard Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What material are die-cut yard signs made from?

Die-cut yard signs are made from 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material. This durable, lightweight, and waterproof material is perfect for outdoor use and can withstand various weather conditions while maintaining its shape and print quality.

Are die-cut yard signs waterproof and weather-resistant?

Yes, custom shaped yard signs are fully waterproof and weather-resistant. The corrugated plastic material and UV-resistant inks ensure your signs maintain their appearance and durability through rain, sun, and other outdoor conditions.

What ground stake options are available?

We offer several ground stake accessories including H Stakes in sizes 10x15, 10x24, and 10x30, as well as Beefy Stakes for enhanced stability. We also provide zip ties in 12-inch black and 36-inch white options for secure installation.

Can you help with my die-cut yard sign design?

Absolutely! Our professional graphic design team can help create your custom shaped yard sign design. We accept various file formats and offer design services to ensure your sign looks professional and achieves maximum impact.

What are shaped (die-cut) yard signs commonly used for?

Custom shaped yard signs are popular for business promotions, political campaigns, real estate listings, construction sites, special events like birthdays and graduations, garage sales, and non-profit organization campaigns. The unique shapes help these signs stand out from traditional rectangular signage.

Do you offer custom sizes for die-cut yard signs?

Yes, we can create custom shaped yard signs in virtually any size you need. Please note that signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Contact our customer service team to discuss specific size requirements for your project.

Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes, we offer order proofs that include a low-resolution image of your artwork, order summary with pricing, and billing/shipping information. Please note that requesting a proof will pause production until you provide approval.

What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

We offer production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days: 1-day Priority, 2-day Express, 3-day Standard, and 5-day Saver options. Turnaround time starts from when your file upload is complete, or from approval time if a proof is requested.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
